# NSURLHandle.Status.loadInProgress

**Case**

The resource data is in the process of loading.

## Declaration

```swift
case loadInProgress
```

## Constants

- **NSURLHandle.Status.notLoaded**: The resource data has not been loaded.
- **NSURLHandle.Status.loadSucceeded**: The resource data was successfully loaded.
- **NSURLHandle.Status.loadFailed**: The resource data failed to load.
